content: {"file": "frontend/storyforge-ui/.angular/cache/17.3.17/vite/deps/@angular_common.js", "summary": "This file exports various Angular common utilities and pipes such as currency, date, number formatting, localization services, and platform-specific utilities.", "rules": [{"name": "Locale Data Registration", "description": "Registers locale data for internationalization purposes.", "conditions": ["getLocaleId()"], "actions": ["registerLocaleData(localeData)"]}, {"name": "Platform Detection", "description": "Determines the current execution environment (browser, server, worker).", "conditions": ["isPlatformBrowser()", "isPlatformServer()", "isPlatformWorkerApp()", "isPlatformWorkerUi()"], "actions": ["return true if condition matches"]}], "dependencies": ["./chunk-ZQGI3ZYG.js", "./chunk-6DT2DWOU.js"]}
